commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh So Esther was taken unto king Ahasuerus into his royal house in the tenth month, which is the month Tebeth, in the seventh year of his reign. Septuagint and old Vulgate, "twelfth month, which is Adar. "Tebeth corresponds with December and January. (Calmet) Notwithstanding all exertions, Esther had been near four years in preparing; (Tirinus; chap. ; Calmet) unless some years had elapsed before she was brought, ver. (Haydock) She was guilty of no sin in becoming an inferior wife of the king. (Menochius) (Tirinus).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
